description: String Insert is a ProtoFlux node that allows for inserting Value (String) into Str (String) at position StartIndex (int).

fields.Str: The string to be inserted into.
fields.Value: The string to insert into Str (String).
fields.StartIndex: The place to insert Value (String) into Str (String).
fields.* ([[Type:String|String]]): Returns Str (String) with Value (String) inserted at position StartIndex (int).
